question: Janet has 24 apples. She gives 8 to her friend and eats 3. How many apples does she have left?
A train travels 60 miles per hour for 2.5 hours. How far does it go?
Sarah bought 5 packs of pencils, each containing 12 pencils. She used 17 pencils. How many are left?
There are 30 students in a class. 40% are boys. How many girls are there?
A book costs $15. With a 20% discount, what is the new price?
Tom has 3 times as many marbles as Jerry. Jerry has 14. How many do they have together?
A rectangle has length 8 and width 5. What is its area?
If 4 workers paint 1 wall in 3 hours, how many hours will 2 workers take to paint the same wall?
A bag has 7 red and 5 blue balls. After adding 8 more red balls, what fraction are red? Give the answer as a decimal.
Lily reads 25 pages a day. How many pages in 2 weeks?
A pizza is cut into 8 slices. If 3 friends each eat 2 slices, how many slices remain?
A car uses 1 gallon for every 30 miles. How many gallons for 240 miles?
If x + 7 = 22, what is x?
A box contains 48 cookies. They are split equally among 6 children. How many cookies does each get?
A shop sells shirts at $20 each. With buy-2-get-1-free, what is the cost of 3 shirts?
A water tank holds 200 liters. It is filled at 25 liters per minute. How many minutes to fill it?
If today is Wednesday, what day will it be 50 days from now? Answer with a number 1-7 where Monday=1.
A square garden has perimeter 36 meters. What is its area?
A class of 28 students has 4 absent. What percent are present?
A bus has 50 seats. 32 are taken. What fraction of seats are empty? Give as a decimal.
Peter has $80. He spends 1/4 on books and 3/8 on food. How much is left?
A triangle has angles in ratio 1:2:3. What is the largest angle in degrees?
If 5x = 35, what is 3x + 4?
A jar has 24 candies. Half are red, a third are green, the rest are blue. How many are blue?
A man earns $400 per week. He saves 15%. How much does he save in 4 weeks?
A cube has volume 27. What is its side length?
If a + b = 10 and a - b = 2, what is a*b?
A movie is 2 hours and 15 minutes long. If it starts at 7:45 PM, when does it end? Give answer as 24-hour HHMM.
A baker uses 3 eggs per cake. He has 5 dozen eggs. How many cakes can he make?
A 50-meter rope is cut into pieces of 2.5 meters each. How many pieces?
Mia has 45 stickers. She gives 1/3 to her sister and 1/5 of the remainder to her friend. How many does she have left?
A farmer has 5 times as many cows as horses. He has 30 cows. How many animals total?
A car costs $20000. It depreciates 10% per year. What is its value after 2 years?
A right triangle has legs 6 and 8. What is the hypotenuse?
Three consecutive integers sum to 72. What is the largest?
A class average is 80 over 10 students. If one student scored 50, what was the average of the other 9?
If 3x + 5 = 2x + 12, what is x?
A pool fills in 6 hours with one pipe and 4 hours with another. How many hours with both pipes? Give as a decimal.
A circle has radius 7. Use pi=22/7. What is its area?
If today is the 5th of a 30-day month, what day of the month is it 60 days later?
